senses.gloss: a variety of squash or gourd
a variety of squash or gourd; pumpkin

etymology.text: Inconspicuous, of a rare pattern yaFʿīL – otherwise found only in يَعْضِيد (yaʕḍīd, “Launaea mucronata”) and يَعْقِيد (yaʕqīd, “thickened honey”) – but connected to the root ق ط ن (q ṭ n), so perhaps from a Semitic substrate.
